request.query: Using the transcript and the chronological local frames around the accusation, determine: (1) which visible person is the man in the light gray jacket, (2) who says or is aligned with the line 'That's the guy that kidnapped me,' (3) which visible person is the target of that accusation and/or the one aligned with the immediate denial 'I... I did not. I didn't.', and (4) which answer option best matches that accused person among: A man with backwards baseball cap, B man wearing glasses, C man wearing a blonde wig, D man in the orange puff jacket, E man in the plaid shirt. Quote the relevant transcript line and base the identity on the visible local interaction only.

segments.text: Mike! Dustin! Mike! Mike! Mike! Dustin! Lucas! Mike! Mike! Eleven? It's me!

Will! Will? Will! Eleven. What are you doing here? How'd you get out of the Upside Down? Pop saved me. I'm just glad you're here, Will. What the hell are you guys doing? That's the guy that kidnapped me. I... I did not. I didn't.

text_contexts: Audit gaps to resolve: which speaker in the accusation exchange is the man in the light gray jacket; which visually identified person is being accused in that exchange; which answer option matches the accused person.

Preprocess context: in this segment a man with long messy blonde hair appears distressed and shouting; later a man with a beard wearing a grey hoodie and Columbia baseball cap is also visible in the woods.
